title: Get a corporate premium indication
body: "Contents   Who is this service for What you’ll need Contact UK Export Finance customer services   You can use this service to request an indicative premium rate for medium or long-term corporate risks for transactions with overseas public or private buyers.  This is where UK Export Finance supports a contract with a corporate buyer as the risk entity through medium-to-long term products such as buyer credit or direct lending facilities, Standard Buyer Loan Guarantees, and Bills and Notes Guarantees.  Who is this service for?  You can use this service to request an indicative premium rate for medium or long term transactions. This tool will only produce the OECD minimum premium rates.  What you’ll need  During your application, you’ll be asked to provide information about your:   country of overseas buyer drawdown period repayment period loan amount loan currency   Start now   Contact UK Export Finance customer services  You should contact our customer services if you:   want to provide feedback on the form or have problems using it   Customer service Email: customer.service@ukexportfinance.gov.uk  Telephone : +44 (0)20 72718010  "
